The question is asking for the release year of the movie "Eagle in a Cage" starring Georgina Hale in the USA. Since the "year" column contains the release year information and the "film" column contains the movie title, we can directly filter the "film" column to find the specific movie and then look at its corresponding "year" value. However, since no grouping is specifically needed for this question, we don't need to use f_group_column(). Instead, we can simply look at the data row where the film matches "eagle in a cage".
The movie "Eagle in a Cage," starring Betty Balcombe (though the question mentions Georgina Hale), was released in 1972 according to the table.
